name: clara-specialist-grand-tour
description: Full live handoff battery covering every specialist route from Clara and every specialist return back to Clara in one staged conversation.

userTurns.label: Maren scenario
userTurns.text: Maren, I need to reshuffle appointments across Berlin and Potsdam after two cancellations tomorrow afternoon.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara from Maren
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Jonas scenario
userTurns.text: Jonas, qualify a plumbing company with six vans that needs faster lead triage and wants to launch within a month.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara from Jonas
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Tobias scenario
userTurns.text: Tobias, turn this field note into a quote draft: leaking flat roof over 120 square meters, damaged insulation near the skylight, access by lift only.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara from Tobias
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Lina scenario
userTurns.text: Lina, show me a follow-up for a customer who missed an estimate appointment and is now going cold.

userTurns.label: Return to Clara from Lina
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Kai scenario
userTurns.text: Kai, a technician wants vacation next month and we need shift coverage. How would you coordinate that?

userTurns.label: Return to Clara from Kai
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.

userTurns.label: Nora scenario
userTurns.text: Nora, compare three locations: Berlin booked 82 jobs at 18 percent quote acceptance, Potsdam booked 54 jobs at 29 percent, and Oranienburg booked 61 jobs at 11 percent. What stands out?

userTurns.label: Return to Clara from Nora
userTurns.text: Please send me back to Clara.
